rationale: Response demonstrates regulatory vocabulary but makes fundamental jurisdictional errors: applies Privacy Shield (invalidated by Schrems II 2020) to an EU-only scenario, cites CCPA (US-California) and HIPAA (US healthcare) as relevant when data never leaves EU. Correct answer is GDPR + Member-State labor codes.
rubric_evidence: CCPA compliance for any California residents (irrelevant—scenario is DE/FR/IT only)
no mention of Member-State employee protections
